hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】熊市买盘后，该策略的比特币持有量超过贝莱德 IBIT；【FINANCE】如果市场剧烈下滑，新的 ETF 策略可能会很脆弱。这就是为什么；【CRYPTO】与 Matt Hougan 一起了解 Bitwise 的 Avalanche ETP 和机构策略。

items.title: Strategy overtakes BlackRock IBIT in bitcoin holdings after bear market buying
items.summary: Leveraged accumulation and new capital tools push MSTR ahead of the world’s largest spot bitcoin ETF.
items.title_zh: 熊市买盘后，该策略的比特币持有量超过贝莱德 IBIT
items.summary_zh: 杠杆积累和新的资本工具推动 MSTR 领先于全球最大的现货比特币 ETF。

items.title: If a violent downturn strikes the market, new ETF strategies may be vulnerable. Here's why
items.summary: Innovation in the exchange-traded fund industry could come at a cost to investors during extreme volatility.
items.title_zh: 如果市场剧烈下滑，新的 ETF 策略可能会很脆弱。这就是为什么
items.summary_zh: 在极端波动期间，交易所交易基金行业的创新可能会让投资者付出代价。

items.title: Inside Bitwise’s Avalanche ETP and institutional strategy with Matt Hougan
items.summary: Matt Hougan explains how ETFs, tokenization, and institutional capital are reshaping crypto and driving the next phase of growth.
items.title_zh: 与 Matt Hougan 一起了解 Bitwise 的 Avalanche ETP 和机构策略
items.summary_zh: Matt Hougan 解释了 ETF、代币化和机构资本如何重塑加密货币并推动下一阶段的增长。

items.title: Grayscale’s amended Hyperliquid ETF filing drops Coinbase as custodian, names Anchorage
items.summary: Grayscale previously tapped Anchorage as a secondary custodian for a portion of the firm’s Bitcoin and Ethereum trusts’ holdings.
items.title_zh: Grayscale 修改后的 Hyperliquid ETF 文件不再由 Coinbase 担任托管人，指定 Anchorage
items.summary_zh: Grayscale 此前曾指定安克雷奇作为该公司部分比特币和以太坊信托资产的二级托管人。

items.title: Introducing GPT-Rosalind for life sciences research
items.summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-Rosalind, a frontier reasoning model built to accelerate drug discovery, genomics analysis, protein reasoning, and scientific research workflows.
items.title_zh: 引入 GPT-Rosalind 用于生命科学研究
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了 GPT-Rosalind，这是一种前沿推理模型，旨在加速药物发现、基因组分析、蛋白质推理和科学研究工作流程。

items.title: The Onion launches new effort to turn Infowars into parody website
items.summary: The new proposal would involve the publication licensing Alex Jones's company, which faces liquidation.
items.title_zh: 《洋葱报》推出新举措，将 Infowars 转变为恶搞网站
items.summary_zh: 新提案将涉及亚历克斯琼斯公司的出版许可，该公司面临清算。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Uncertainty Surrounds U.S.-Iran Talks as Cease-Fire Nears End
items.summary: Vice President JD Vance was set to return to Pakistan for peace talks, U.S. officials said, though Iran has not confirmed that its negotiators will attend.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：停火接近尾声，美伊谈判充满不确定性
items.summary_zh: 美国官员表示，副总统万斯将返回巴基斯坦进行和平谈判，但伊朗尚未证实其谈判代表将出席。

items.title: Bitcoin reclaims $75,000 as Iran ceasefire talks advance, equities rally resumes
items.summary: Bitcoin traded at $75,733 on Tuesday morning, up 1.5% over 24 hours, as Iran signaled it will send a team to Pakistan talks and Brent crude slipped ahead of the Wednesday ceasefire deadline.
items.title_zh: 随着伊朗停火谈判的进展，股市恢复涨势，比特币重回 75,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 周二上午，比特币交易价格为 75,733 美元，24 小时内上涨 1.5%，因伊朗表示将派出一支团队前往巴基斯坦进行谈判，且布伦特原油在周三停火截止日期前下跌。

items.title: Scammers demand crypto ‘clearance’ fees from ships near Strait of Hormuz: report
items.summary: Greek maritime risk firm MARISKS warned shippers of fraudulent Hormuz transit demands paid in bitcoin or USDT, according to Reuters.
items.title_zh: 诈骗者向霍尔木兹海峡附近的船只索要加密货币“清关”费：报告
items.summary_zh: 据路透社报道，希腊海事风险公司 MARISKS 警告托运人注意以比特币或 USDT 支付的欺诈性霍尔木兹过境要求。

items.title: Codex for (almost) everything
items.summary: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.
items.title_zh: （几乎）所有内容的法典
items.summary_zh: 适用于 macOS 和 Windows 的更新后的 Codex 应用程序增加了计算机使用、应用程序内浏览、图像生成、内存和插件，以加速开发人员工作流程。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: JPMorgan expands $1.5 trillion economic security splurge into Europe
items.summary: The banking giant is looking to invest in areas deemed critical to economic security, including defense and AI.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通将 1.5 万亿美元的经济安全投资扩大到欧洲
items.summary_zh: 这家银行巨头正在寻求投资对经济安全至关重要的领域，包括国防和人工智能。

items.title: Software stock dogs have joined market rally. There's a classic investing lesson in the rebound
items.summary: In a 2026 market that had Microsoft down close to 20%, looking for opportunities to buy after big drawdowns is coming to more tech and software stocks.
items.title_zh: 软件股也加入了市场上涨行列。反弹中有一个经典的投资教训
items.summary_zh: 在 2026 年的市场中，微软股价下跌了近 20%，更多科技和软件股票在大幅下跌后寻找买入机会。

items.title: Retail traders pile into Allbirds after odd AI pivot. History shows it won't end well
items.summary: This surge of speculative buying reflects a broader return of animal spirits among small traders.
items.title_zh: 在奇怪的人工智能转向之后，零售交易员纷纷涌入 Allbirds。历史表明它不会有好结局
items.summary_zh: 投机性买盘的激增反映出小贸易商的动物精神更广泛地回归。

items.title: Outrage over Israeli soldier's vandalism of Jesus statue in Lebanon
items.summary: The Israeli military says it views with "great severity" the actions of the soldier, as the US ambassador demands "swift" consequences.
items.title_zh: 对以色列士兵破坏黎巴嫩耶稣雕像的愤怒
items.summary_zh: 以色列军方表示，他们“非常严厉”地看待这名士兵的行为，因为美国大使要求“迅速”采取行动。

items.title: Japan on high alert for 'huge' second quake after lifting tsunami warning
items.summary: Japan's meteorological agency warns another, stronger earthquake may hit in the next week.
items.title_zh: 日本解除海啸警报后对第二次“特大”地震保持高度警惕
items.summary_zh: 日本气象厅警告称，下周可能会发生另一场更强的地震。

items.title: How the Cole Disaster Drove the U.S. to Develop New Warship Defenses
items.summary: The Navy destroyers enforcing a blockade of Iranian ports carry weapons fielded after an American warship was attacked and nearly sunk more than 25 years ago.
items.title_zh: 科尔灾难如何促使美国开发新的军舰防御系统
items.summary_zh: 执行封锁伊朗港口的海军驱逐舰携带了25年前一艘美国军舰遭到袭击并险些沉没后部署的武器。

items.title: Japan to Sell More Weapons Abroad, Breaking With Postwar Pacifism
items.summary: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi reversed limits on arms exports as Japan faces rising threats from China and unpredictability from its main ally, the United States.
items.title_zh: 日本将向海外出售更多武器，打破战后和平主义
items.summary_zh: 由于日本面临来自中国的日益严重的威胁以及其主要盟友美国的不可预测性，日本首相高市早苗取消了对武器出口的限制。

items.title: Javier Milei Tamed Argentina’s Inflation. Now He Wants to Reshape Its Values.
items.summary: Argentina’s right-wing president has tamed the country’s runaway inflation. Now he wants to transform its values.
items.title_zh: 哈维尔·米莱 (Javier Milei) 抑制了阿根廷的通货膨胀。现在他想重塑其价值观。
items.summary_zh: 阿根廷右翼总统遏制了该国失控的通货膨胀。现在他想改变它的价值观。

items.title: Ukraine, Short on Troops, Is Turning to Robots to Help Its War Efforts
items.summary: Ukraine is using unmanned ground vehicles armed with bombs, guns or rockets to carry out attacks and keep its soldiers out of harm’s way.
items.title_zh: 军队短缺的乌克兰正在转向机器人来帮助其战争努力
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰正在使用配备炸弹、枪支或火箭的无人地面车辆进行攻击，并确保其士兵免受伤害。

items.title: Pakistan’s Leaders Try to Contain Rising Anger Over Iran War at Home
items.summary: With deep spiritual ties to Iran, Pakistan’s minority Shiites are angry about the killing of Iran’s top clerics in U.S.-Israeli strikes, complicating Pakistan’s role as mediator.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦领导人试图遏制国内对伊朗战争日益高涨的愤怒
items.summary_zh: 巴基斯坦少数派什叶派与伊朗有着深厚的精神联系，他们对伊朗高级神职人员在美以袭击中被杀感到愤怒，这使得巴基斯坦作为调解者的角色变得更加复杂。

items.title: Bank of Korea’s new governor signals CBDC and bank token push, skips stablecoins in key address
items.summary: The BOK will increase scrutiny of crypto markets and non-bank finance, and will also modernize currency markets for 24-hour foreign exchange trading, he said.
items.title_zh: 韩国央行新行长表示将推动 CBDC 和银行代币，但在关键地址上跳过了稳定币
items.summary_zh: 他表示，韩国央行将加强对加密货币市场和非银行金融的审查，并将实现货币市场现代化，实现 24 小时外汇交易。

items.title: KelpDAO hackers are laundering millions in stolen crypto, data show
items.summary: KelpDAO hackers are moving $290M in stolen crypto across blockchains, using privacy tools to mask the trail as DeFi contagion fears move through the sector.
items.title_zh: 数据显示，KelpDAO 黑客正在洗钱数以百万计的被盗加密货币
items.summary_zh: 随着 DeFi 蔓延的担忧蔓延到整个行业，KelpDAO 黑客正在跨区块链转移价值 2.9 亿美元的被盗加密货币，并使用隐私工具来掩盖踪迹。

items.title: A dozen banks want a euro stablecoin. Fireblocks is making it happen
items.summary: The Qivalis consortium is made up of: Banca Sella, BBVA, BNP Paribas, CaixaBank, Danske Bank, DekaBank, DZ BANK, ING, KBC, Raiffeisen Bank International, SEB, and UniCredit.
items.title_zh: 十几家银行想要欧元稳定币。 Fireblocks 正在让这一切发生
items.summary_zh: Qivalis 财团由以下成员组成：Banca Sella、BBVA、法国巴黎银行、CaixaBank、Danske Bank、DekaBank、DZ BANK、ING、KBC、Raiffeisen Bank International、SEB 和 UniCredit。

items.title: Bank of Korea’s new chief vows to push CBDC, deposit tokens; leaves out stablecoins
items.summary: BOK Governor Shin Hyun-song previously took a negative stance on stablecoins during his tenure at the BIS.
items.title_zh: 韩国央行新任行长誓言推动 CBDC、存款代币；排除稳定币
items.summary_zh: 韩国央行行长申贤松此前在国际清算银行任职期间对稳定币持负面立场。

items.title: The next evolution of the Agents SDK
items.summary: OpenAI updates the Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and a model-native harness, helping developers build secure, long-running agents across files and tools.
items.title_zh: Agents SDK 的下一步发展
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过本机沙箱执行和模型本机工具更新了 Agents SDK，帮助开发人员跨文件和工具构建安全、长期运行的代理。

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.summary: Nano Banana 2 now uses your personal context and Google Photos to create images that reflect your unique life.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini 应用程序中创建个性化图像的新方法
items.summary_zh: Nano Banana 2 现在使用您的个人背景和 Google Photos 来创建反映您独特生活的图像。

items.title: Bringing AI-driven protein-design tools to biologists everywhere
items.summary: Founded by Tristan Bepler PhD ’20 and former MIT professor Tim Lu PhD ’07, OpenProtein.AI offers researchers open-source models and other tools for protein engineering.
items.title_zh: 为世界各地的生物学家带来人工智能驱动的蛋白质设计工具
items.summary_zh: OpenProtein.AI 由 Tristan Bepler 博士 '20 和前麻省理工学院教授 Tim Lu 博士 '07 创立，为研究人员提供开源模型和其他蛋白质工程工具。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Bitcoin is less volatile than South Korea's stock market right now
items.summary: Bitcoin's comparative stability during geopolitical turmoil has reinforced its appeal as a hedge.
items.title_zh: 目前比特币的波动性低于韩国股市
items.summary_zh: 比特币在地缘政治动荡期间的相对稳定性增强了其作为对冲工具的吸引力。

items.title: ChatGPT for research
items.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT for research to gather sources, analyze information, and create structured, citation-backed insights.
items.title_zh: 用于研究的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 进行研究，以收集资源、分析信息并创建结构化的、有引文支持的见解。

items.summary: Today’s upgrades for AI Mode in Chrome transform how you interact with the web

items.summary_zh: 今天 Chrome 中 AI 模式的升级改变了您与网络交互的方式

items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 3 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems
items.summary: MIT researchers developed a testing framework that pinpoints situations where AI decision-support systems are not treating people and communities fairly.
items.title_zh: 评估自治系统的伦理
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了一个测试框架，可以查明人工智能决策支持系统不公平对待人和社区的情况。

items.title: AST SpaceMobile shares drop after its satellite is placed in wrong orbit by Bezos' Blue Origin
items.summary: Blue Origin acknowledged the satellite was placed in the wrong orbit, but has not commented since it was deemed lost.
items.title_zh: 贝佐斯的蓝色起源将 AST SpaceMobile 的卫星送入错误轨道后，其股价下跌
items.summary_zh: 蓝色起源承认这颗卫星被放置在错误的轨道上，但由于被认为丢失而没有发表评论。

items.title: AI startup Cursor in talks to raise $2 billion funding round at valuation of over $50 billion
items.summary: Artificial intelligence startup Cursor in talks to raise a $2 billion fundraising round at an over $50 billion valuation, which does not include the investment.
items.title_zh: AI初创公司Cursor正在洽谈融资20亿美元，估值超过500亿美元
items.summary_zh: 人工智能初创公司 Cursor 正在洽谈一轮 20 亿美元融资，估值超过 500 亿美元，其中不包括投资。

items.title: Here are 3 forces that drove a remarkable, record-setting week on Wall Street
items.summary: The S&P 500 closed above 7,100 for the first time as it completed its fastest turnaround since 1990.
items.title_zh: 以下三股力量推动了华尔街创下非凡创纪录的一周
items.summary_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数首次收于 7,100 点之上，完成了 1990 年以来最快的反转。

items.title: Goldman Sachs bond traders stumbled as Wall Street rivals thrived: 'A fire is being lit under' them
items.summary: Goldman's identity as a trader's firm — one expected to perform in turbulent markets — makes any stumble in the division notable.
items.title_zh: 高盛债券交易员跌跌撞撞，而华尔街竞争对手却蓬勃发展：“他们的底下正在点燃一把火”
items.summary_zh: 高盛作为交易商公司的身份——预计将在动荡的市场中表现出色——使得该部门的任何失误都引人注目。

items.title: Regulators are reportedly zeroing in on suspicious trades ahead of market-moving Trump post
items.summary: The information sought includes so-called Tag 50 identifiers, which can be used to determine who was behind the trades.
items.title_zh: 据报道，在特朗普发表影响市场的言论之前，监管机构正在重点关注可疑交易
items.summary_zh: 寻求的信息包括所谓的 Tag 50 标识符，可用于确定交易背后的人员。

items.title: Morgan Stanley tops estimates as trading revenue exceeds expectations by nearly $1 billion
items.summary: Morgan Stanley's results in the quarter were powered by the firm's fixed income and equities trading operations, which produced about $8.5 billion in revenue.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利交易收入超预期近 10 亿美元，超出预期
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利本季度的业绩得益于该公司的固定收益和股票交易业务，产生了约 85 亿美元的收入。

items.title: Trump says US will not lift Hormuz blockade until deal made with Iran
items.summary: The US president's comments come amid uncertainty over whether Iran will attend peace talks in Pakistan this week.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称在与伊朗达成协议之前美国不会解除霍尔木兹封锁
items.summary_zh: 美国总统发表上述言论之际，伊朗是否会参加本周在巴基斯坦举行的和谈还存在不确定性。

items.title: New era as Apple names new boss to replace Tim Cook after 15 years
items.summary: Ternus will take over running the technology giant in September as Cook steps up to become executive chairman.
items.title_zh: 苹果任命新老板接替 15 年后的蒂姆·库克，开启新时代
items.summary_zh: 随着库克出任执行董事长，Ternus 将于 9 月份接管这家科技巨头的运营。

items.title: Japan loosens arms export rules in break from post-WW2 pacifism
items.summary: This clears the way for Japan to sell weapons to more than a dozen countries.
items.title_zh: 日本放宽武器出口规则，打破二战后和平主义
items.summary_zh: 这为日本向十多个国家出售武器扫清了道路。

items.title: South Africa's police boss charged in connection with controversial health contract
items.summary: Fannie Masemola is accused of failing in his duties to provide proper oversight in his role.
items.title_zh: 南非警察局长因有争议的医疗合同而被指控
items.summary_zh: 房利美马塞莫拉被指控未能履行对其角色进行适当监督的职责。

items.title: Canadian killed in shooting at Mexico's ancient Teotihuacán pyramids
items.summary: Several people were also injured in the incident on Monday at the popular tourist site, say Mexican officials, weeks before the country hosts the Fifa World Cup.
items.title_zh: 加拿大人在墨西哥古特奥蒂瓦坎金字塔枪击事件中丧生
items.summary_zh: 墨西哥官员称，距离该国举办国际足联世界杯还有几周时间，周一在这个受欢迎的旅游景点发生的事件中也有多人受伤。

items.title: US singer D4vd pleads not guilty to murder in death of missing teen girl
items.summary: Prosecutors say the singer, real name David Anthony Burke, could face life in prison due to the nature of the case, if convicted.
items.title_zh: 美国歌手 D4vd 对失踪少女死亡的谋杀罪不认罪
items.summary_zh: 检察官表示，由于案件的性质，这位真名大卫·安东尼·伯克的歌手如果被定罪，可能面临终身监禁。

items.title: Oil prices rise after Trump says Iranian ship seized
items.summary: Energy markets have seen wild swings since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗船只被扣押后油价上涨
items.summary_zh: 自2月28日美国和以色列袭击伊朗以来，能源市场出现剧烈波动。

items.title: London Braces for Disruption From Tube Drivers’ Strike
items.summary: The dispute over working conditions and hours is expected to cause widespread delays, stopping service on two lines.
items.title_zh: 伦敦为地铁司机罢工造成的干扰做好准备
items.summary_zh: 关于工作条件和工作时间的争议预计将导致大范围的延误，两条线路将停止服务。

items.title: New Zealand Declares Emergency in Capital After It Was Battered by Torrential Rain
items.summary: There were landslides, flash floods and the closure of more than 100 schools in Wellington and the surrounding region.
items.title_zh: 新西兰首都遭受暴雨袭击后宣布进入紧急状态
items.summary_zh: 惠灵顿及周边地区发生山体滑坡、山洪爆发，100 多所学校关闭。

items.title: A Leaner Saudi Arabia Turns From Grandiose Plans to Pragmatism
items.summary: A decade after Mohammed bin Salman unveiled his “Vision 2030” program to transform the country’s economy, the kingdom is facing financial strains and reassessing its trajectory.
items.title_zh: 精简的沙特阿拉伯从宏伟计划转向实用主义
items.summary_zh: 穆罕默德·本·萨勒曼公布其旨在改变国家经济的“2030 年愿景”计划十年后，沙特王国正面临着财政压力，并正在重新评估其发展轨迹。

items.title: Starmer Voices Fury Over Being Kept in the Dark on Mandelson Vetting
items.summary: During intense grilling in Parliament, Prime Minister Keir Starmer blamed civil servants for not telling him that Peter Mandelson had been rejected for top security clearances.
items.title_zh: 斯塔默对曼德尔森审查蒙在鼓里表示愤怒
items.summary_zh: 在议会的激烈质询中，总理基尔·斯塔默指责公务员没有告诉他彼得·曼德尔森的最高安全许可被拒绝。

items.title: Arbitrum freezes $71 million in ether tied to Kelp DAO exploit
items.summary: The layer-2 network's security council moved 30,766 ETH to a frozen intermediary wallet, accessible only via further governance action.
items.title_zh: Arbitrum 冻结了与 Kelp DAO 漏洞相关的价值 7100 万美元的以太币
items.summary_zh: 第二层网络的安全委员会将 30,766 ETH 转移到冻结的中间钱包中，只有通过进一步的治理行动才能访问。

items.title: Ripple wants the XRP Ledger to be quantum-proof by 2028. Here is its plan
items.summary: Ripple has laid out a four-phase plan to make the XRP Ledger quantum-resistant by 2028.
items.title_zh: Ripple 希望 XRP Ledger 到 2028 年能够实现量子防护。这是它的计划
items.summary_zh: Ripple 制定了一个四阶段计划，到 2028 年使 XRP Ledger 具有量子抗性。

items.title: North Korea’s crypto heist playbook is expanding and DeFi keeps getting hit
items.summary: More than $500 million was siphoned across the Drift and Kelp exploits in just over two weeks. What once looked like isolated breaches now resembles a sustained campaign, likely driven by the financial needs of a sanctioned state.
items.title_zh: 朝鲜的加密货币抢劫策略正在扩大，DeFi 不断受到打击
items.summary_zh: 在短短两周多的时间里，Drift 和 Kelp 漏洞利用活动就挪用了超过 5 亿美元的资金。曾经看似孤立的违规行为现在看起来像是一场持续的活动，很可能是由受制裁国家的财务需求驱动的。

items.title: Aave could face up to $230 million in losses after Kelp DAO bridge exploit triggers DeFi chaos
items.summary: Aave published a report outlining two possible outcomes: around $123 million in losses if damage is shared across all rsETH, or up to $230 million if confined to Layer 2s, with the final impact depending on how Kelp DAO allocates the shortfall.
items.title_zh: Kelp DAO 桥接漏洞引发 DeFi 混乱后，Aave 可能面临高达 2.3 亿美元的损失
items.summary_zh: Aave 发布了一份报告，概述了两种可能的结果：如果损害由所有 rsETH 分担，则损失约为 1.23 亿美元；如果仅限于第 2 层，则损失高达 2.3 亿美元，最终影响取决于 Kelp DAO 如何分配缺口。

items.title: Japan’s JSCC partners with Mizuho, Nomura to test government bonds on blockchain
items.summary: The proof-of-concept trial will test the onchain transfer and management of Japanese government bonds on Canton Network.
items.title_zh: 日本 JSCC 与瑞穗、野村合作测试区块链政府债券
items.summary_zh: 概念验证试验将测试日本政府债券在 Canton Network 上的链上转移和管理。

items.title: Arbitrum freezes $71 million worth of ETH stolen in Kelp DAO exploit
items.summary: The Arbitrum Security Council said the frozen funds will only be moved by further action through Arbitrum governance.
items.title_zh: Arbitrum 冻结了 Kelp DAO 漏洞中被盗的价值 7100 万美元的 ETH
items.summary_zh: Arbitrum 安理会表示，只有通过 Arbitrum 治理采取进一步行动，才能转移被冻结的资金。

items.title: Kelp DAO shifts blame to LayerZero for $292 million exploit; Aave examines bad debt scenarios
items.summary: Kelp DAO has countered LayerZero's earlier statement, saying the 1-of-1 DVN setup under criticism was shipped as the default at LayerZero.
items.title_zh: Kelp DAO 将 2.92 亿美元的漏洞归咎于 LayerZero； Aave 检查坏账情况
items.summary_zh: Kelp DAO 反驳了 LayerZero 之前的声明，称受到批评的 1-of-1 DVN 设置是作为 LayerZero 的默认设置提供的。

items.title: Senate crypto bill faces April setback amid growing pressure to get legislation through: report
items.summary: Tensions are building to schedule a hearing to advance crypto market structure legislation, which could reportedly be pushed to May.
items.title_zh: 由于立法压力越来越大，参议院加密货币法案在 4 月份面临挫折：报告
items.summary_zh: 安排听证会以推进加密市场结构立法的紧张局势正在加剧，据报道该听证会可能会推迟到 5 月。

items.title: Pokémon TCG marketplaces near record as tokenized collectibles show staying power
items.summary: The tokenization layer of these platforms is being used as a liquidity wrapper, as opposed to a purely speculative venue.
items.title_zh: 宝可梦 TCG 市场接近历史新高，代币化收藏品显示出持久力
items.summary_zh: 这些平台的代币化层被用作流动性包装器，而不是纯粹的投机场所。

items.title: DeFi losses top $600 million in weeks as Kelp DAO exploit drags TVL to one-year low
items.summary: Kelp Dao, Aave and LayerZero are pointing the finger at each other and it is still unclear how losses will be distributed.
items.title_zh: 由于 Kelp DAO 漏洞将 TVL 拖至一年低点，DeFi 损失在几周内突破 6 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Kelp Dao、Aave 和 LayerZero 互相指责，目前尚不清楚损失将如何分配。

items.title: OpenAI helps Hyatt advance AI among colleagues
items.summary: Hyatt deploys ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, using GPT-5.4 and Codex to improve productivity, operations, and guest experiences.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 帮助凯悦在同事中推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 凯悦在其全球员工中部署 ChatGPT Enterprise，使用 GPT-5.4 和 Codex 来提高生产力、运营和宾客体验。

items.title: Accelerating the cyber defense ecosystem that protects us all
items.summary: Leading security firms and enterprises join OpenAI’s Trusted Access for Cyber, using GPT-5.4-Cyber and $10M in API grants to strengthen global cyber defense.
items.title_zh: 加速保护我们所有人的网络防御生态系统
items.summary_zh: 领先的安全公司和企业加入 OpenAI 的网络可信访问，利用 GPT-5.4-Cyber​​ 和 1000 万美元的 API 拨款来加强全球网络防御。

items.title: Trusted access for the next era of cyber defense
items.summary: OpenAI expands its Trusted Access for Cyber program, introducing GPT-5.4-Cyber to vetted defenders and strengthening safeguards as AI cybersecurity capabilities advance.
items.title_zh: 下一个网络防御时代的可信访问
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 扩展了其可信网络访问计划，向经过审查的防御者引入 GPT-5.4-Cyber​​，并随着 AI 网络安全能力的进步而加强保障措施。

items.title: Enterprises power agentic workflows in Cloudflare Agent Cloud with OpenAI
items.summary: Cloudflare brings OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 and Codex to Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with speed and security.
items.title_zh: 企业通过 OpenAI 为 Cloudflare Agent Cloud 中的代理工作流程提供支持
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 将 OpenAI 的 GPT-5.4 和 Codex 引入 Agent Cloud，使企业能够快速、安全地构建、部署和扩展用于实际任务的 AI 代理。

items.title: Brainstorming with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT to brainstorm ideas, organize thinking, and turn rough concepts into structured, actionable plans.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 进行头脑风暴
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 集思广益、组织思维，并将粗略的概念转化为结构化、可操作的计划。

items.title: Prompting fundamentals
items.summary: Learn prompting fundamentals and how to write clear, effective prompts to get better, more useful responses from ChatGPT.
items.title_zh: 提示基础知识
items.summary_zh: 学习提示基础知识以及如何编写清晰、有效的提示，以便从 ChatGPT 获得更好、更有用的响应。

items.title_zh: QIMMA قِّבÉ ⛰：质量第一的阿拉伯语 LLM 排行榜

items.title_zh: 如何使用合成人物角色让韩国人工智能代理融入真实人口统计数据

items.title_zh: Ecom-RLVE：电子商务会话代理的自适应可验证环境

items.title_zh: 你自己开的 PR

items.title: Inside VAKRA: Reasoning, Tool Use, and Failure Modes of Agents
items.title_zh: VAKRA 内部：代理的推理、工具使用和故障模式

items.title: Meet HoloTab by HCompany. Your AI browser companion.
items.title_zh: 了解 HCompany 的 HoloTab。您的人工智能浏览器伴侣。

items.title: Waypoint-1.5: Higher-Fidelity Interactive Worlds for Everyday GPUs
items.title_zh: Waypoint-1.5：适用于日常 GPU 的更高保真度交互世界

items.title: Safetensors is Joining the PyTorch Foundation
items.title_zh: Safetensors 即将加入 PyTorch 基金会

items.title: 7 ways to travel smarter this summer, with help from Google
items.summary: The latest tools from Google can help you plan trips, find a great deal and explore your next destination.
items.title_zh: 在 Google 的帮助下，今年夏天智能出行的 7 种方式
items.summary_zh: Google 的最新工具可以帮助您计划旅行、找到超值优惠并探索下一个目的地。

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS：下一代富有表现力的人工智能语音
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
items.summary: Skills in Chrome let you discover, save and remix AI workflows — and repeat them instantly.
items.title_zh: 将您最好的 AI 提示变成 Chrome 中的一键式工具
items.summary_zh: Chrome 中的技能可让您发现、保存和重新混合 AI 工作流程 - 并立即重复它们。

items.title: Bringing people together at AI for the Economy Forum
items.summary: Google is bringing people together in Washington D.C. at our AI for the Economy Forum.
items.title_zh: 人工智能经济论坛将人们聚集在一起
items.summary_zh: 谷歌将人们聚集在华盛顿特区，参加我们的人工智能经济论坛。

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.title_zh: Gemini API 中平衡成本和可靠性的新方法
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Vids 中免费创建、编辑和分享视频
items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.title_zh: 我们正在创建新的卫星图像地图，以帮助保护巴西的森林。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与巴西政府合作开发卫星图像地图，以帮助保护该国的森林。

items.title: Q&A: MIT SHASS and the future of education in the age of AI
items.summary: As the School of Humanities, Arts, and Social Sciences marks 75 years, Dean Agustín Rayo reflects on how AI is reshaping higher education and why SHASS disciplines continue to be central to MIT’s mission.
items.title_zh: 问答：MIT SHASS 和人工智能时代教育的未来
items.summary_zh: 在人文、艺术和社会科学学院成立 75 周年之际，院长 Agustín Rayo 反思了人工智能如何重塑高等教育，以及为什么 SHASS 学科仍然是麻省理工学院使命的核心。

items.title: Sixteen new START.nano companies are developing hard-tech solutions with the support of MIT.nano
items.summary: Startup accelerator program grows to over 30 companies, almost half of them with MIT pedigrees.
items.title_zh: 十六家新的 START.nano 公司正在 MIT.nano 的支持下开发硬技术解决方案
items.summary_zh: 创业加速器计划已发展到超过 30 家公司，其中几乎一半拥有 MIT 出身。

items.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
items.summary: Dean Price, assistant professor in the Department of Nuclear Science and Engineering, sees a bright future for nuclear power, and believes AI can help us realize that vision.
items.title_zh: 致力于推进核复兴
items.summary_zh: 核科学与工程系助理教授 Dean Price 看到了核电的光明前景，并相信人工智能可以帮助我们实现这一愿景。
